description_long: This house features a combination of stone and brick exterior walls, complemented by a dark gray gable roof with multiple slopes and levels. The structure includes a main two-story section and a single-story extension, with several large windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. Lush greenery and mature trees surround the property, enhancing its residential charm. The front entryway is marked by a covered porch with an arched opening, and there is a visible driveway leading to a garage. Ivy or climbing plants are present on some walls, adding a touch of natural integration. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, making it suitable for a suburban neighborhood.
description: A two-story stone and brick house with a dark gable roof, large windows, a covered porch, and surrounding trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and a portion of the driveway, with trees and greenery framing the house.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the gable roof, stone walls, and a small balcony or terrace area, with more visible greenery.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear garden area, additional windows, and the integration of trees and landscaping around the house.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the tall windows, arched porch entry, and the overall verticality of the main structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with an arched opening, single main door, and minimal decorative elements
